subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that hath been sent down from the heaven of My loving-kindness unto My servants who have believed in Me and have detached themselves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتابی قد نزل من سماء عنایتی لعبادی الذینهم آمنوا بنفسی و انقطعوا عن
